exactVolterraIdentity: D_trace(x,y)=1/2 sum_sigma w_sigma int [M_sigma_x N_sigma_y + N_sigma_x M_sigma_y] du
signedFeatureIdentity: D_trace(x,y)=sum_sigma int [G_sigma_plus_x G_sigma_plus_y - G_sigma_minus_x G_sigma_minus_y] du

greenMinimizerFeatureDefinitionStatus.label: Green minimizer Volterra feature definition
greenMinimizerFeatureDefinitionStatus.reason: The full feature-map ledger defines M, N, and G_+/G_- on Euler-Lagrange Green minimizers.

signedSquareCompletionStatus.label: signed Volterra square completion
signedSquareCompletionStatus.reason: The elementary pointwise identity rewrites MN+NM as plus-square minus minus-square.

notClaimedHere: This consequence does not claim the open honest positive Volterra/Green Gram square from the full feature-map ledger.
